zh.lifeSummary: 當LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND於大約1230年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾斯特拉頓時，他的父親Thomas de Moray III22歲，母親Juliana de Kilconquar18歲。他於大約1245年與LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特卡里克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1262年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾梅露絲享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND于大约1230年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾斯特拉頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Moray III22岁，母亲Juliana de Kilconquar18岁。他于大约1245年与LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特卡里克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1262年在英国苏格兰洛包爾梅露絲享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: RANDOLPH
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Randerson
meanings: English (West and East Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Randolf (see Randolph ) + -son. In East Anglia the name may also have been influenced by a form of the now rare or extinct Rendlesham, itself from the place of that name in Suffolk. The placename probably derives from an Old English personal name Rendel (genitive Rendeles) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

variants.name: Randolf
meanings: English and German: variant of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: THOMAS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND was born about 1230, in Strathdon, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Moray III, was 22 and his mother, Juliana de Kilconquar, was 18. He married LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR about 1245, in Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1262, in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND est né environ 1230, à Strathdon, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Moray III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Kilconquar, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR environ 1245, à Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1262, à Melrose, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND um 1230 in Strathdon, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Moray III 22 und seine Mutter Juliana de Kilconquar 18. Er hat um 1245 in Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1262 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLANDが約1230年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアストラスドンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Moray IIIは22歳，母Juliana de Kilconquarは18歳であった。約1245年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトカーリックでLADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHARと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1262年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアメルローゼで33歳で死去した。

ko.Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 카릭
ko.lifeSummary: LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 스트래스던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Moray III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Kilconquar(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1245년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 카릭에서 LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 멜로즈에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR aproximadamente 1245, em Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Carrick, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: каррикк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND родился около 1230 г. в местности стратдон, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Moray III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Kilconquar, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени LADY JULIANA DE KILCONQUHAR около 1245 г. в местности каррикк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1262 г. в местности мелрос, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
